entry.title: v2.3.0: new AlertDialog composition
entry.summary: Release 2.3.0 introduces a new AlertDialog composition primitive with refined focus-trap behavior and improved screen-reader announcement semantics. Ships with a migration note for users of the prior AlertDialog.Root API.

entry.title: Radix Primitives 2.2.1 (patch)
entry.summary: Patch release 2.2.1 ships bugfixes for edge-case focus handling in nested portals and a build-time tree-shaking improvement. No API changes.
